title: expand_url_template silently leaves unreplaced {type} in download URL
description: When download_blob is called with accept_type=None but the server's download URL template contains {type}, expand_url_template does a no-op replace and the literal string '{type}' stays in the URL. The request fires with a malformed URL; the server returns a 4xx with no indication the cause is a missing template variable. No post-expansion check detects unreplaced {...} tokens.
